visualizerParams.title: Binary OR Logic Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The manual binary OR implementation is not producing correct results. It seems the bitwise comparison logic is wrong. Identify and fix the flaw.

solution.explanation: The bitwise OR operation returns 1 if AT LEAST one of the corresponding bits is 1. The buggy code incorrectly used the `and` condition, which implements a bitwise AND instead of an OR.
